news.t: Best Agricultural Commodity ETFs for Q1 2021

overview.description: The First Trust Alternative Absolute Return Strategy ETF (FAAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in multi-strategy alternatives. The fund is an actively-managed fund that, through a subsidiary, provides broad long/short exposure to commodity futures contracts. FAAR was launched on May 18, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.

holdings.n: First Eagle Alternative Capital BDC Inc

data.title: Best Agricultural Commodity ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best agricultural commodity ETFs for Q1 2021 are SOYB, WEAT, and FAAR.
